description_long: This object is a round, flask-like handbag with a matte black body encased in a brown leather-like holder. The main body is spherical with subtle engraved lines and a slight sheen, topped with a small, light tan cork stopper. A single, wide brown strap arches over the top, attached to the holder at two points, allowing for easy carrying. The strap appears sturdy and is integrated into the holder with visible stitching and a decorative swirl at the attachment points. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible logos or embellishments, and the surface finish is smooth with a slight gloss. The handbag's compact size and robust construction suggest it is both functional and stylish for urban use.
description: A round, matte black handbag with a brown leather-like holder and a single wide strap, topped with a tan cork stopper. Minimalistic and sturdy, it features subtle engraved lines and a smooth, slightly glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spherical black body, tan cork stopper, and wide brown strap arching over the top, with subtle engraved lines visible on the body.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the thickness and curvature of the strap, as well as the decorative swirl at the strap's attachment point.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the spherical body with a prominent engraved line and the strap's symmetrical attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the other strap attachment and the smooth, continuous surface of the holder.
attribute_strap_type: Single wide shoulder strap, fixed length, attached at two points on the holder with visible stitching and decorative swirl.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Cork stopper closure at the top center of the spherical body.
attribute_decorative_elements: Decorative swirl at strap attachment points.
